pundit.name: Landon Donovan
pundit.take: **Look, I get why people say "The Noisemaker" is all noise and no knowledge, but when your first three draft picks don't even qualify for the World Cup, it's hard to keep up appearances.** Rafe might have more chaos than actual soccer sense, but bless his heart, he's keeping pace with the middle of the pack at 12 points, proving sometimes ignorance is bliss. Devin’s sitting at a tie with 12 points too, so I feel for him, I really do—especially after putting faith in Haiti in the fourth round. What conversation were you having, Ghost Pepper? Zach, or "Mustard Boy," is still leading with 16 points, but anyone who's depending on Saudi Arabia as a dark horse might want to prepare for an early exit. Gayden, our "Backpass Assassin," trails with 10 points, perhaps wishing the World Cup was won in reverse. But bless his heart, we know he means well. And then there's Gunner, right there with the Devin-Rafe tie, holding onto hopes with France. Though everyone seems to be eyeing Zach, I think all this posturing means the mid-pack could easily flip the script if the chips fall just right. But let's be real—the only thing certain about this pool is its unpredictability.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach's Brazil Dominates Haiti, Leaves Devin's Strategy in Ruins
pundit_takes.subtitle: Apparently, drafting just for flag colors isn't a winning tactic.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden's Japan Set to Confound Tunisia With Advanced Backpassing
pundit_takes.subtitle: "I think passes should always go backward," says The Backpass Assassin.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe's Germany Poised to Test Gayden's Ivory Coast
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Noisemaker's advice: cheer loud, hope for the best.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Tops WC Pool, Declares Himself Condiment King
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach proves the power of mustard over ghost peppers and noisemakers.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gayden's ranking is crumbling faster than a sandcastle in a hurricane.
Rafe's Tier-1 dependency matches his age: 15.
Devin must be allergic to Rafe, losing twice to a soccer newbie.
Gunner's surge threw the model harder than a teenager's first driving lesson.
